document_title: Schedule of Base Unit Market Values for Residential, Commercial and Industrial Lands — Sabangan

_meta.source: Office of the Provincial Assessor, Mountain Province — Sabangan Form No. 1.docx (Office Order, 2025-04-24)
_meta.act: RA 12001 (Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act), Section 15
notes: Official schedule: 2 commercial classes (C-1, C-2) + 5 residential classes (R-1..R-5). Replaces the earlier R-1..R-12 draft.
Standard depth: 30 m for both residential and commercial lands.
Existing R-6..R-12 polygons in sabangan_zones.geojson are orphans under this schedule and need manual re-tagging in the editor.

items.location_description: Commercial lots along the National Road: Nacagang Junction to Palinga-ao (Lagan); Nacagang Junction to Lintoco (Supang); Nacagang Junction to Poblacion to Panorama (Losad).

Commercial lots along the National Road from Bisibisan (Supang) to Dawaic (Supang); along the Provincial Road from Dawdawan to Madepdeppas to Pinumdeng (Data); along the National Road from Panorama (Losad) through Bun-ayan, Bao-angan, Pingad, Camatagan, Capinitan, Busa, Namatec to Aw-awigan (Napua boundary).
Residential lots along the National Road: Nacagang/Tambingan Junction to Palinga-ao (Lagan); Nacagang Junction to Lintoco (Supang); Nacagang Junction from Poblacion to Panorama (Losad).

Residential lots along the National Road from Bisibisan (Supang) to Dawaic (Supang); along the Provincial Road from Dawdawan (Data) to Madepdeppas to Pinumdeng (Data); along the National Road from Panorama (Losad) through Bun-ayan, Bao-angan, Pingad, Camatagan, Capinitan, Busa, Namatec to Aw-awigan (Napua); inner from Nacagang to Palinga-ao (Lagan) to Bisibisan (Supang) to Dawaic (Supang); and within Poblacion, Lagan, Losad (except Sitio Sao and Osong, Losad).

Residential lots along all Provincial, Municipal, and Barangay roads in Supang, Madepdeppas and Proper Data (Sitio Abatan Junction to Proper Data), Bun-ayan, Gayang, Camatagan, Capinitan, Namatec, Upper Tambingan, and Napua.

Residential lots in the inner part of Data, Upper Tambingan, Maggon (sitio of Supang), Supang, Sao and Osong (sitios of Losad), Bun-ayan, Bao-angan, Camatagan, Gayang, Capinitan, Busa, Namatec, and Napua.
Residential lots in the inner part of Sitio Duskit, Napua.
